name: Appro Technology Inc.
summary: Appro Technology Inc. engages in the design and development of a range of security and surveillance systems in Taiwan. The company offers cloud IP cameras, including Wi-Fi and IP cameras; professional IP cameras, such as box IP, fixed-dome, speed dome, bullet, and fisheye IP cameras; video servers; network video recorders; and accessories, such as racks and mounts. It also provides software solutions comprising AppPro APP and Central Management System 1030. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
